name: Game Music Festival 2026
description: Taking place at the most prestigious venues in Europe and hosting world-class performers on stage, GMF is an immersive event that showcases the impact of video game music as a form of art. Performances on 6th, 13th, 19th & 27th June 2026.
short_description: World-class performers at Europe's most prestigious venues, showcasing video game music as a form of art. Performances on 6th, 13th, 19th & 27th June.
